notes: Per PROP-003.a token meter sidecar mechanics.
poll_interval_minutes: cron cadence (5 min default per proposal)
stale_threshold_seconds: emit _warning when last snapshot older than this (10 min default)
stale_data_threshold_seconds: when manual-quota-log entry is older than this, mark data_source 'manual-paste-stale' (24h default)
data_source_priority: source preference order; sidecar tries each in turn. headless-cost not yet implemented (Plan B per proposal); manual-paste is the active source (Plan A)
*_override fields let Founder pin specific caps without editing the script. null = use script defaults (matches QUOTA_CAPS in aggregate-token-usage.py)
